# Locked, hashed runtime dependencies for the isolated review image.
#
# Root: dstack-sdk (in-CVM TDX quote). This pins its full dependency closure to
# exact versions and every wheel hash, so the image build is reproducible and
# every dependency is immutable. Installed with `pip install --require-hashes`.
#
# Generated from uv.lock (single source of truth).
